title: MC Randomizer
body:
Randomize several aspects of Minecraft!
Can currently:
- Give random items
- Randomize recipes
- Randomize block drops, mob drops, and/or chest loot
- Randomly generate structures
- Randomize mob spawns
- And maybe more in the future...

If you have any issues, please let me know on the repository's [issue tracker](https://github.com/ghzdude/MCRandomizer/issues).
